'''''Bundil II''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[XQ2 Platform]] which was also used as a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] station.

==History==
The station was to receive prisoners from [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] by the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[VTR-LX]]''. However it was attacked at [[Calast]] where all of its [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] were lost and Rebel [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] were in pursuit. The ship managed to arrive at ''Bundil II'' when it was disabled by rebel Y-wings.

Once the dreadnaught was disabled, the station, knowing that this was a rescue operation, unleashed its wings of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]]. They were all destroyed. When the [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] arrived at the station, ''Bundil'' II, out of desperation, launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]], all of which were destroyed as well. The station called for any Imperial ships to assist which the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] [[Archon (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Archon'']] arrived. By that time however, the prisoners were rescued and the Dreadnaught was destroyed by a bomb left behind by the Rebel Commandos.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
